navigation_overview: Parabank is a sample banking application. When visitors arrive, they see the sign-in page, which offers an Email / Username and Password form, a Register link for new customers, and a Forgot Password? link for credential recovery. After a successful log-in, users reach their account dashboard displaying every account and balance. The left-hand navigation menu now contains the following options: ① Accounts Overview (default dashboard view), ② Open New Account, ③ Transfer Funds, ④ Bill Pay, ⑤ Request Loan, ⑥ Update Contact Info, ⑦ Manage Cards, ⑧ Investments, ⑨ Account Statements, ⑩ Security Settings, ⑪ Support Center, and ⑫ Log Out.

module_summaries.summary:
Line 1: Users can sign in with their Email/Username and Password or use the Forgot Password link.
Line 2: Displays Email/Username and Password fields, validation requirements, and authentication success/error messages.

Line 1: Users can create a new account by completing and submitting the registration form with personal, contact, and credential details.
Line 2: Displays required fields (name, address, state, ZIP, phone, SSN, username/email, password), formatting/validation hints, and validation errors.

Line 1: Users can view their customer accounts list and interact with account entries (account number links are present though not implemented yet).
Line 2: Displays a welcome message and a table of accounts showing masked account numbers, account type, current balance, status, open date, and a total-balance footer.

Line 1: Users can open a new Checking or Savings account by selecting an account type, entering an initial deposit, choosing a funding source, and submitting the form.
Line 2: Displays account type selection cards with features and minimums, initial deposit and funding account fields, real-time validation and error messages.

Line 1: Users can initiate internal or external transfers by selecting transfer type, choosing a source account, specifying destination details, and entering an amount.
Line 2: Displays transfer type options, source account dropdown (Checking/Savings only), destination selection or account entry/confirmation, and validation messages for amount and sufficient funds.

Line 1: Users can submit bill payments by entering payee contact and account details, selecting a source account, and confirming the payment amount.
Line 2: Displays payee name and address fields, payee account and confirm-account inputs, payment amount, source account selector, and success/error messages with a reference code.

Line 1: Users can apply for Personal, Auto, or Home loans by selecting a loan type, entering loan and down payment amounts, and selecting a collateral account.
Line 2: Displays loan type cards with interest rates and allowed amount ranges, loan amount and down payment fields, collateral account selector, and approval/validation outcomes.

Line 1: Users can edit and update their contact/profile information and submit changes.
Line 2: Displays a pre-filled editable form with first/last name, street address, city, state, ZIP, phone, an Update Profile button, and inline validation/errors or success confirmation.

Line 1: Users can request a new debit or credit card and manage existing card controls (set spending limits, travel notices, and change card status).
Line 2: Displays card request fields (card type, account to link, shipping address) and card controls (existing card selector, spending limit, travel notice dates/destinations, card status) plus submission confirmations and tracking IDs.

Line 1: Users can view their investment portfolio snapshot and execute buy/sell trades by selecting a fund symbol, quantity, and funding/destination account.
Line 2: Displays a read-only portfolio panel with current holdings, market value and unrealized gain/loss, and a trade form (action, fund symbol autocomplete, quantity, account) with validation and execution results.

Line 1: Users can generate account statements for a chosen period/account and manage e-statement (paperless) preferences.
Line 2: Displays statement period and account selectors, Generate Statement button with results or errors, plus e-statement preference checkbox and email field with save confirmation.

Line 1: Users can change their password by entering the current password and a new password (with confirmation) and submitting the change.
Line 2: Displays the collapsible Change Password panel with current/new/confirm password fields, Change Password button, and success/error validation messages.

Line 1: Users can send secure messages with optional attachments or schedule a callback by providing reason and preferred date/time.
Line 2: Displays secure message fields (subject, category, rich-text body, attachment), schedule callback fields (reason, preferred date and time window), and ticket/confirmation or inline error guidance.

test_cases.title: Successful sign in using username
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields (Email/Username with a registered username, Password with the corresponding valid password)
Click "Sign In"
test_cases.expected_result: User sees "Signed in successfully." and is redirected to the Accounts Overview page.

test_cases.title: Protected routes inaccessible after logout
test_cases.preconditions: User has just logged out after an active session
steps: After logging out, attempt to navigate to a protected page (for example, Transfer Funds) by entering its direct URL.
Observe the application's response to the navigation attempt.
Verify access to the protected page is denied or the user is redirected to the login page.
test_cases.expected_result: Attempts to access protected routes after logout result in redirection to the login page or an access-denied response.

test_cases.title: Direct URL access while logged out redirects to login
test_cases.preconditions: User is not logged in
steps: Open a browser and enter the direct URL for a protected page (for example, the Accounts Overview page).
Observe the browser navigation after the request completes.
Verify the login page is displayed and the login form (Email/Username and Password fields) is present.
test_cases.expected_result: The user is redirected to the login page and presented with the login form instead of the protected content.

test_cases.title: Open forgot password flow via "Forgot Password?" link
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the login page.
steps: Verify the "Forgot Password?" link is visible and enabled on the login page
Click the "Forgot Password?" link
test_cases.expected_result: Reset-password workflow is initiated and a reset form or instructions are displayed.

test_cases.title: Logout from user menu terminates session and shows login page
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in
steps: While logged in, open the user/profile menu and click the Log Out option.
Wait for the application to complete the logout action and navigate.
Verify the login page is displayed and authenticated UI elements (account lists, balances, protected navigation) are no longer visible.
test_cases.expected_result: The session is terminated and the login page is displayed instead of authenticated content.

test_cases.title: Browser refresh after logout does not restore authenticated session
test_cases.preconditions: User has just logged out
steps: After completing logout and confirming the login page is displayed, click the browser refresh/reload button.
Wait for the page to finish reloading.
Verify no authenticated content reappears and the user remains on the login page.
test_cases.expected_result: Refreshing the browser after logout does not restore the authenticated session and no protected content is shown.

test_cases.title: Attempt login with incorrect credentials
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill Email/Username with a registered identifier and Password with an incorrect password
Click "Sign In"
test_cases.expected_result: Error message 'Incorrect email or password. Please try again,' is shown, the password field is cleared, and the user may attempt to sign in again.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Incorrect email or password. Please try again,

test_cases.title: Page refresh while logged in keeps user logged in
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in on an authenticated page
steps: While authenticated and viewing a protected page (for example, Accounts Overview), click the browser refresh/reload button.
Wait for the page to finish reloading.
Verify the user remains authenticated and the protected page re-renders without redirecting to the login page.
test_cases.expected_result: After refresh the user remains logged in and the protected page content is displayed (no redirect to login).

test_cases.title: Already-logged-in user navigating to login URL is redirected to authenticated landing page
test_cases.preconditions: User is already logged in
steps: With an active authenticated session, navigate to the application's login URL.
Observe the resulting navigation behavior.
Verify the user is redirected away from the login page to the authenticated landing page (for example, Accounts Overview) and the login form is not shown.
test_cases.expected_result: The application redirects the already-authenticated user away from the login page to the authenticated landing page.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Sign In"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Email/Username is required

test_cases.title: Attempt sign in with password not meeting complexity requirements
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields (Email/Username with a registered identifier, Password that does not meet the specified complexity)
Click "Sign In"
test_cases.expected_result: Authentication fails showing "Incorrect email or password. Please try again," and the password field is cleared.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character

test_cases.title: Login with password at minimum length that meets complexity
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill Email/Username with a registered identifier and Password with a value exactly at the minimum required length that satisfies uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character rules
Click "Sign In"
test_cases.expected_result: Flash message 'Signed in successfully.' is shown and the user is redirected to the Accounts Overview page.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character

test_cases.title: Auto-format SSN while typing
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Focus the Social Security Number field
Type a continuous sequence of numeric digits into the SSN field
Observe the field content as digits are entered
test_cases.expected_result: Field content updates incrementally to match the 123-45-6789 pattern as the user types.

test_cases.title: Register with all valid inputs
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields (First Name, Last Name, Street Address, City, State, ZIP Code, Phone Number, Social Security Number, Username, Password, Confirm Password) with valid values
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Success message "Account created successfully — please sign in" is displayed and the page redirects to the login page

test_cases.title: Auto-format phone number on blur
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill Phone Number with a valid ten-digit numeric string (no formatting)
Move focus out of the Phone Number field
test_cases.expected_result: Phone Number is displayed in the (123) 456-7890 format.

test_cases.title: Auto-format phone number when pasted
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Paste an unformatted or variably formatted ten-digit phone number into the Phone Number field
test_cases.expected_result: Phone Number is normalized and displayed in the (123) 456-7890 format.

test_cases.title: Auto-format phone number while typing
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Type a valid ten-digit phone number digit-by-digit into the Phone Number field
test_cases.expected_result: Phone Number updates incrementally and ends up in the (123) 456-7890 format.

test_cases.title: Successful registration shows success message and redirects to login
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required registration fields with valid values
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: The message "Account created successfully — please sign in" is displayed and the user is redirected to the login page.

test_cases.title: Submit with Password field empty
test_cases.preconditions: Registration page is open.
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, leave Password empty
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Password is required.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Password is required

test_cases.title: Submit with invalid Username format
test_cases.preconditions: Registration page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values, enter an invalid email format into Username
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Username must be a valid email format.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Username must be a valid email format

test_cases.title: Submit with non-matching Confirm Password
test_cases.preconditions: Registration page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values, enter a valid Password and enter a different value in Confirm Password
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Confirm Password must match the Password field.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Confirm Password must match the Password field

test_cases.title: Submit with Password shorter than required length
test_cases.preconditions: Registration page is open.
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values, enter a Password shorter than the minimum length and set Confirm Password to the same short value
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Password must meet minimum length requirement.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Password must be at least 8 characters

test_cases.title: Accept 5-digit ZIP Code during registration
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values including a valid 5-digit ZIP Code
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Registration proceeds without ZIP Code format errors and success message is shown

test_cases.title: Phone number auto-formats on input during registration
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values except Phone Number; enter unformatted numeric digits into Phone Number field
Move focus out of the Phone Number field
test_cases.expected_result: Phone Number is automatically formatted to (123) 456-7890 in the Phone Number field

test_cases.title: Social Security Number auto-formats on input during registration
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values except Social Security Number; enter unformatted numeric digits into Social Security Number field
Move focus out of the Social Security Number field
test_cases.expected_result: Social Security Number is automatically formatted to 123-45-6789 in the SSN field

test_cases.title: Submit with City field empty
test_cases.preconditions: Registration page is open.
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, leave City empty
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating City is required.
test_cases.spec_evidence: City is required

test_cases.title: Submit with State not selected
test_cases.preconditions: Registration page is open.
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, leave State unselected
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating State is required.
test_cases.spec_evidence: State is required

test_cases.title: Submit with ZIP Code field empty
test_cases.preconditions: Registration page is open.
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, leave ZIP Code empty
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating ZIP Code is required.
test_cases.spec_evidence: ZIP Code is required

test_cases.title: Submit with Last Name field empty
test_cases.preconditions: Registration page is open.
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, leave Last Name empty
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Last Name is required.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Last Name is required

test_cases.title: Submit with Phone Number field empty
test_cases.preconditions: Registration page is open.
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, leave Phone Number empty
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Phone Number is required.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Phone Number is required

test_cases.title: Submit with improperly formatted SSN
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, set Social Security Number to an incorrectly formatted value
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Field-level validation error shown indicating SSN format is invalid.
test_cases.spec_evidence: SSN must follow the format 123-45-6789 with automatic formatting

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: On submission the system validates field completeness, pattern conformance, and password match

test_cases.title: Submit with Street Address field empty
test_cases.preconditions: Registration page is open.
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, leave Street Address empty
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Street Address is required.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Street Address is required

test_cases.title: Submit with improperly formatted Phone Number
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, set Phone Number to an incorrectly formatted value
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Field-level validation error shown indicating Phone Number format is invalid.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Phone Number must follow the format (123) 456-7890 with automatic formatting

test_cases.title: Submit with Social Security Number field empty
test_cases.preconditions: Registration page is open.
steps: Fill all other required fields with valid values, leave Social Security Number empty
Click "Register"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Social Security Number is required.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Social Security Number is required

test_cases.title: Partial SSN (fewer than nine digits) does not produce complete formatting on blur
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Enter fewer than nine digits into the Social Security Number field
Move focus away from the Social Security Number field
test_cases.expected_result: No complete 123-45-6789 formatting is applied; the field does not show the full formatted pattern.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Social Security Number is automatically formatted to 123-45-6789

test_cases.title: Dashboard shows welcome message with user's name
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview dashboard is displayed
steps: Locate the welcome message area on the dashboard
Verify the welcome message contains the logged-in user's name
test_cases.expected_result: Welcome message displays the user's name.

test_cases.title: Footer displays total balance across all accounts
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview dashboard is displayed with multiple accounts
steps: Locate the footer row of the accounts table
Verify the footer total equals the sum of the Current Balance values from all visible account rows
test_cases.expected_result: Footer row displays the correct total balance across all accounts.

test_cases.title: Accounts table displays required columns in each row
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview dashboard is displayed
steps: Inspect the accounts table rows
Verify each row displays Account Number (clickable element), Account Type, Current Balance, Account Status (Active badge), and Open Date
test_cases.expected_result: Every account row shows Account Number, Account Type, Current Balance, Account Status (Active badge), and Open Date.

test_cases.title: Accounts are ordered by creation date (earliest first)
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview dashboard is displayed with multiple accounts
steps: Inspect the Open Date values for the accounts table rows
Verify the rows are ordered by Open Date with the earliest date appearing first
test_cases.expected_result: Table rows are ordered by account creation date (earliest first).

test_cases.title: Account numbers are masked showing only last four digits
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview dashboard is displayed
steps: Inspect the Account Number cells in the accounts table
Verify each displayed account number uses masking and shows only the last four digits with preceding mask characters
test_cases.expected_result: Account numbers are displayed in masked format, revealing only the last four digits.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Account numbers are masked for security (showing only last 4 digits as ****5001)

test_cases.title: Active accounts display an Active status badge
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview dashboard is displayed with at least one active account
steps: Inspect the Account Status column for each account row
Verify active accounts show an Active badge in the status column
test_cases.expected_result: Active accounts show an Active badge in the Account Status column.

test_cases.title: Clicking Account Number does not navigate (clickable not implemented yet)
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Accounts Overview dashboard is displayed
steps: Click an Account Number entry in the accounts table
Observe whether the dashboard remains visible and no account detail navigation occurs
test_cases.expected_result: Clicking the Account Number does not navigate away from the dashboard (feature not implemented).
test_cases.spec_evidence: Account Number (clickable but not implemented yet)

test_cases.title: Open new Savings account with valid deposit and sufficient funding
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and on the Open New Account page
steps: Select the Savings account type card
Fill Initial Deposit Amount with a valid numeric amount meeting the Savings minimum
Select a funding source account with sufficient balance
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: Account opened successfully and user is redirected to the accounts overview.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and on the Open New Account page
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Real-time validation errors are displayed

test_cases.title: Submit without selecting account type
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and on the Open New Account page
steps: Leave account type unselected, fill other required fields with valid values
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating account type must be selected is shown.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Validation error shown if account type is not selected

test_cases.title: Enter non-numeric Initial Deposit Amount
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and on the Open New Account page
steps: Select an account type, fill Initial Deposit Amount with a non-numeric value, select a funding source with sufficient balance
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the Initial Deposit Amount must be numeric is shown.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Initial Deposit Amount must be numeric

test_cases.title: Initial Deposit below minimum for Checking
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and on the Open New Account page
steps: Select the Checking account type card
Fill Initial Deposit Amount with a numeric amount below the Checking minimum, select a funding source with sufficient balance
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the Initial Deposit Amount does not meet the required minimum is shown.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Initial Deposit Amount must meet minimums ($25 for Checking, $100 for Savings)

test_cases.title: Attempt to open account when funding source has insufficient balance
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and on the Open New Account page
steps: Select an account type, fill Initial Deposit Amount with a valid numeric amount meeting the selected account minimum
Select a funding source account that does not have sufficient balance
Click "Open Account"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the funding source account lacks sufficient balance is shown.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Funding Source Account must have sufficient balance

test_cases.title: Real-time validation displays error for non-numeric deposit input
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and on the Open New Account page
steps: Select an account type
Enter a non-numeric value into the Initial Deposit Amount field and observe the field without submitting
test_cases.expected_result: A real-time validation error is displayed for the Initial Deposit Amount field without submitting the form.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Real-time validation errors are displayed

test_cases.title: Complete an external transfer successfully
test_cases.workflow: Transfer funds to an External Account
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Transfer Funds page and has a Checking or Savings account with sufficient funds.
steps: Select the "External Account" transfer type
Select a source account from the Source Account dropdown
Fill all required fields (External account number, Confirm account number, Transfer Amount) with valid matching values and an amount within the available balance
Click "Submit"
test_cases.expected_result: Transfer completed successfully. A transaction ID is displayed.

test_cases.title: Transfer funds between own accounts with valid amount
test_cases.workflow: Transfer funds between My ParaBank accounts
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Transfer Funds form is open.
steps: Select Transfer type "My ParaBank Account"
Fill all required fields (Source Account: a Checking or Savings account, Destination Account: another own account, Transfer Amount: valid amount within available funds)
Click "Transfer"
test_cases.expected_result: "Transfer completed successfully." message is shown and a transaction ID is displayed.

test_cases.title: Source Account dropdown shows only Checking and Savings accounts
test_cases.workflow: Transfer funds between My ParaBank accounts
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Transfer Funds form is open.
steps: Click the Source Account dropdown
Observe the list of accounts shown
test_cases.expected_result: Only Checking and Savings accounts appear in the Source Account dropdown.

test_cases.title: Transfer fails when insufficient funds are available
test_cases.workflow: Transfer funds between My ParaBank accounts
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Transfer Funds form is open.
steps: Select Transfer type "My ParaBank Account"
Fill all required fields (Source Account: account with insufficient balance, Destination Account: another own account, Transfer Amount: amount greater than available balance)
Click "Transfer"
test_cases.expected_result: A contextual error is displayed indicating the transfer cannot proceed due to insufficient funds.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates sufficient funds

test_cases.title: Destination options update when transfer type changes
test_cases.workflow: Transfer funds between My ParaBank accounts
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Transfer Funds page is open
steps: Select transfer type "My ParaBank Account" and observe the Destination input/list
Select transfer type "External Account" and observe the Destination input/list
test_cases.expected_result: Destination options change based on the selected transfer type

test_cases.title: Source Account dropdown shows only Checking and Savings
test_cases.workflow: Transfer funds to an External Account
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and the Transfer Funds page is open.
steps: Select the "External Account" transfer type
Open the Source Account dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Source Account dropdown lists only Checking and Savings account options.

test_cases.title: Destination options update when External Account selected
test_cases.workflow: Transfer funds to an External Account
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and the Transfer Funds page is open.
steps: Select the "External Account" transfer type
Observe the destination options/fields on the page
test_cases.expected_result: Destination options update to reflect external transfers and account number entry fields are visible.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.workflow: Transfer funds between My ParaBank accounts
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Transfer Funds page is open
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Transfer"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates transfer amount

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.workflow: Transfer funds to an External Account
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and the Transfer Funds page is open.
steps: Select the "External Account" transfer type
Leave all required fields empty
Click "Submit"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: For external transfers, users enter and confirm the account number

test_cases.title: Submit with mismatched external account numbers
test_cases.workflow: Transfer funds to an External Account
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Transfer Funds page, has a Checking or Savings account, and has selected External Account transfer type.
steps: Select the "External Account" transfer type
Fill all required fields with valid values, enter a different value in Confirm account number than in External account number
Click "Submit"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error 'Account numbers do not match.' is displayed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Failures display contextual errors such as "Account numbers do not match."

test_cases.title: Reject transfer with invalid transfer amount format
test_cases.workflow: Transfer funds to an External Account
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and the Transfer Funds page is open.
steps: Select the "External Account" transfer type
Fill all required fields (choose a Source Account, enter matching Account number and Confirm account number, enter an invalid Transfer Amount format)
Click "Submit"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown for the Transfer Amount field.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates transfer amount

test_cases.title: Reject transfer with zero or negative amount
test_cases.workflow: Transfer funds between My ParaBank accounts
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Transfer Funds form is open.
steps: Select Transfer type "My ParaBank Account"
Fill all required fields (Source Account, Destination Account, Transfer Amount: zero or a negative value)
Click "Transfer"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown indicating the transfer amount is invalid.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates transfer amount

test_cases.title: Submit payment with valid details
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and on the Submit Payment page.
steps: Fill all required fields (Payee Name, Street Address, City, State, ZIP Code, Phone Number, Payee Account Number, Confirm Account Number, Payment Amount, Source Account) with valid and matching values
Click "Pay"
test_cases.expected_result: Success message "Payment submitted successfully." with a reference code is displayed; the payment is executed and account balances are updated.

test_cases.title: Submit with non-matching account numbers
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and on the Submit Payment page.
steps: Fill all required fields with valid data, enter a Payee Account Number and a different Confirm Account Number
Click "Pay"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline error indicating account numbers do not match is displayed and the form remains editable.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Account numbers do not match

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and on the Submit Payment page.
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Pay"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields and the form remains editable.
test_cases.spec_evidence: All entries are validated on submission

test_cases.title: Submit payment equal to available funds (boundary funds check)
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and on the Submit Payment page.
steps: Fill all required fields with valid and matching account details and a Payment Amount equal to the available balance of the selected Source Account
Click "Pay"
test_cases.expected_result: Payment submitted successfully with a reference code and the Source Account balance is updated accordingly (reduced by the payment amount).
test_cases.spec_evidence: Checks available funds

test_cases.title: Auto loan accepts amount at maximum boundary
test_cases.workflow: Select Loan Type Card + Validate Loan Amount Range
test_cases.preconditions: Request Loan form is visible
steps: Select the Auto loan type card
Fill all required fields (Loan Amount set to exactly the maximum allowed for the selected loan type)
Click "Submit"
test_cases.expected_result: Loan Amount is accepted and no validation error is shown for the selected loan type

test_cases.title: Home loan accepts amount at minimum boundary
test_cases.workflow: Select Loan Type Card + Validate Loan Amount Range
test_cases.preconditions: Request Loan form is visible
steps: Select the Home loan type card
Fill all required fields (Loan Amount set to exactly the minimum allowed for the selected loan type)
Click "Submit"
test_cases.expected_result: Loan Amount is accepted and no validation error is shown for the selected loan type

test_cases.title: Request loan successfully when credit approves
test_cases.preconditions: Credit engine approves the application.
steps: Select the desired loan type card (Personal/Auto/Home)
Fill all required fields (Loan Amount within type-specific range, Down Payment meeting minimum percentage and less than Loan Amount, select Collateral Account with sufficient funds)
Click "Run Credit Simulation" and confirm approval is displayed
Click "Submit" to create the loan
test_cases.expected_result: Loan approved and created successfully! with the new loan account details displayed.

test_cases.title: Request loan with valid inputs resulting in approval
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Select the desired loan type card
Fill all required fields (Loan Amount within the loan type range, Down Payment meeting minimum and less than loan amount)
Select a Collateral Account with sufficient available funds
Click "Run Credit Simulation", then when simulation shows approval click "Submit"
test_cases.expected_result: When the credit simulation returns approval, the page shows "Loan approved and created successfully!" and the new loan account details are displayed.

test_cases.title: Submit loan request with valid down payment and collateral
test_cases.workflow: Validate Down Payment Amount + Select Collateral Account + Validate Collateral Funds and Value
test_cases.preconditions: User is on the Request Loan page
steps: Fill all required fields (Loan Amount, Down Payment Amount less than Loan Amount and meeting the minimum percentage)
Select a Collateral Account from the dropdown that has sufficient funds and a collateral value meeting the required percentage
Click "Request Loan"
test_cases.expected_result: Loan request is submitted for credit evaluation and a confirmation is shown.

test_cases.title: Request loan and display approval with created loan details
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and the Request Loan form is visible.
steps: Fill all required fields (Loan Amount, Down Payment Amount, Collateral Account, Interest Rate)
Click "Request Loan" or the form's submit control
test_cases.expected_result: "Loan approved and created successfully!" is displayed and the created loan account details are shown on the confirmation.

test_cases.title: Request Personal loan with a valid amount within allowed range
test_cases.workflow: Select Loan Type Card + Validate Loan Amount Range
test_cases.preconditions: Request Loan form is visible
steps: Select the Personal loan type card
Fill all required fields (Loan Amount with a valid value within the Personal loan range)
Click "Submit"
test_cases.expected_result: Loan Amount is accepted and no validation error is shown for the selected loan type

test_cases.title: Approve loan shows success message and created loan account details
test_cases.preconditions: A loan request is in "Pending Approval" status and approval action is available on the page.
steps: Click "Approve"
Confirm approval in the approval dialog
test_cases.expected_result: The confirmation displays the exact message "Loan approved and created successfully!" and the created loan account details (account number, loan amount, interest rate, down payment, collateral reference) are shown in the approval confirmation.

test_cases.title: Request loan with valid inputs resulting in denial displays reasons
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Select the desired loan type card
Fill all required fields (Loan Amount within the loan type range, Down Payment meeting minimum and less than loan amount)
Select a Collateral Account
Click "Run Credit Simulation"
test_cases.expected_result: When the credit simulation returns denial, denial reasons are displayed such as "Insufficient credit history" or "Inadequate collateral value".

test_cases.title: Simulate credit approval with valid inputs results in loan creation
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields (Loan Amount, Down Payment Amount, Collateral Account) with valid values ensuring down payment meets the minimum
Click "Simulate Credit Approval"
test_cases.expected_result: "Loan approved and created successfully!" message is displayed and the newly created loan account details are shown; account balances remain unchanged (no actual balance debits occur).

test_cases.title: Display 'Inadequate collateral value' when collateral validation fails
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with values expected to pass credit but fail collateral validation and select the collateral account with insufficient value
Click "Apply"
test_cases.expected_result: Loan application is denied and a specific denial reason 'Inadequate collateral value' is displayed.

test_cases.title: Reject when Down Payment equals or exceeds Loan Amount
test_cases.workflow: Validate Down Payment Amount + Select Collateral Account + Validate Collateral Funds and Value
test_cases.preconditions: Request Loan form is open.
steps: Fill Down Payment Amount equal to or greater than the Loan Amount and fill other required fields (Loan Amount, select Collateral Account)
Click "Submit"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error stating the down payment must be less than the loan amount and submission is blocked.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Down payment < loan amount

test_cases.title: Request loan denied due to inadequate collateral value
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Select the desired loan type card
Fill all required fields (Loan Amount within range, Down Payment meeting minimum and less than Loan Amount, select Collateral Account with insufficient funds relative to required collateral)
Click "Run Credit Simulation" and then "Submit"
test_cases.expected_result: Application is denied with a reason indicating inadequate collateral value.
test_cases.spec_evidence: 20% collateral value

test_cases.title: Display denial reasons when credit engine denies application
test_cases.preconditions: Credit engine denies the application.
steps: Select the desired loan type card
Fill all required fields with valid values
Click "Run Credit Simulation" and observe denial
Click "Submit" or confirm denial outcome
test_cases.expected_result: Application is denied and the UI displays specific denial reasons.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Denial shows specific reasons like

test_cases.title: Engine denies loan showing 'Inadequate collateral value' reason
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields (Loan Amount, Down Payment Amount, Collateral Account) with values where selected collateral value is insufficient
Click "Simulate Credit Approval"
test_cases.expected_result: Loan is denied and the denial reason 'Inadequate collateral value' is displayed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Inadequate collateral value

test_cases.title: Engine denies loan showing 'Insufficient credit history' reason
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields (Loan Amount, Down Payment Amount, Collateral Account) with values that would trigger a credit-history based denial
Click "Simulate Credit Approval"
test_cases.expected_result: Loan is denied and the denial reason 'Insufficient credit history' is displayed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Insufficient credit history

test_cases.title: Display multiple denial reasons when more than one check fails
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with values that would concurrently fail multiple validations (for example, credit eligibility and collateral value)
Click "Apply"
test_cases.expected_result: Loan application is denied and all applicable denial reasons are displayed as a list (e.g., credit and collateral reasons).

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Leave all required fields empty on the Request Loan form
Click "Submit" or "Request Loan"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: System validates amount ranges

test_cases.title: Loan amount at minimum boundary is accepted
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Select the desired loan type card
Fill Loan Amount equal to the type-specific minimum and fill other required fields with valid values
Click "Run Credit Simulation"
test_cases.expected_result: System accepts the minimum loan amount and proceeds to credit simulation or next step.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Loan Amount type-specific ranges: Personal: $1,000-$50,000, Auto: $5,000-$75,000, Home: $50,000-$500,000

test_cases.title: Confirmation shows exact approval message text
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and the Request Loan form is visible.
steps: Fill all required fields (Loan Amount, Down Payment Amount, Collateral Account, Interest Rate)
Click "Request Loan"
Verify the on-screen confirmation message text exactly matches the expected approval phrase
test_cases.expected_result: The confirmation message exactly matches "Loan approved and created successfully!"
test_cases.spec_evidence: Loan approved and created successfully!

test_cases.title: Auto loan rejected when amount is just below minimum
test_cases.workflow: Select Loan Type Card + Validate Loan Amount Range
test_cases.preconditions: Request Loan form is visible
steps: Select the Auto loan type card
Fill all required fields (Loan Amount with an amount just below the minimum allowed for the selected loan type)
Click "Submit"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error shown indicating the Loan Amount is outside the allowed range for the selected loan type.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Loan Amount type-specific ranges: Personal: $1,000-$50,000, Auto: $5,000-$75,000, Home: $50,000-$500,000

test_cases.title: Denial displays reason and does not debit account balances
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with values expected to trigger a denial (credit or collateral)
Click "Apply"
test_cases.expected_result: Loan is denied with a specific denial reason displayed and no account balances are debited as part of the denial process.
test_cases.spec_evidence: In this mock system, no actual balance debits occur

test_cases.title: Approving a loan does not debit account balances in the mock system
test_cases.preconditions: A loan request is in "Pending Approval" status and a collateral account with a visible balance is shown on the same page.
steps: Record the displayed balance for the collateral account on the page
Click "Approve" and confirm the approval
Verify the success message is displayed and that the recorded collateral account balance remains unchanged
test_cases.expected_result: Success message displayed and the collateral account balance remains the same as before approval; created loan account details are shown.
test_cases.spec_evidence: In this mock system, no actual balance debits occur

test_cases.title: Loan creation does not debit any account balances in mock system
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and account balances for involved accounts are visible on the Request Loan page.
steps: Note the displayed balances for the collateral/source accounts involved
Fill all required fields (Loan Amount, Down Payment Amount, Collateral Account, Interest Rate)
Click "Request Loan"
Verify the displayed balances for those accounts remain unchanged after approval
test_cases.expected_result: No account balances are debited as a result of loan creation; balances remain the same as before submission.
test_cases.spec_evidence: In this mock system, no actual balance debits occur

test_cases.title: Verify simulated approval rate approximates configured probability
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Repeat: Fill required fields (Loan Amount, Down Payment Amount, Collateral Account) with valid values and click "Simulate Credit Approval" across many iterations, recording approval outcomes
Calculate the percentage of approvals and verify it falls close to the configured probability
test_cases.expected_result: Observed approval percentage is approximately 80% within an acceptable tolerance.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Credit engine simulates 80% approval rate

test_cases.title: When credit engine simulation denies, a specific denial reason is shown
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with values that would ordinarily meet validations
Click "Apply"
test_cases.expected_result: If the credit engine simulation results in a denial, a specific denial reason (for example, insufficient credit history) is displayed to the user.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Credit engine simulates 80% approval rate

test_cases.title: Updated profile persists after page refresh
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Update Contact Info form is visible
steps: Modify a contact field (e.g., Phone Number) with a valid value
Click "Update Profile"
Reload the form/page
test_cases.expected_result: The updated value remains visible and the form shows the refreshed data after reload.

test_cases.title: Update profile with valid contact information
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Update Contact Info form is visible
steps: Modify one or more fields (First Name, Last Name, Street Address, City, State, ZIP Code, Phone Number) with valid values
Click "Update Profile"
test_cases.expected_result: Profile updated successfully and the form displays the refreshed updated data.

test_cases.title: Form displays pre-filled contact information
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Update Contact Info form is visible
steps: Verify form fields (First Name, Last Name, Street Address, City, State, ZIP Code, Phone Number) are pre-filled with the user's current contact information
test_cases.expected_result: Editable form is pre-filled with the user's contact information.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Update Contact Info form is visible
steps: Clear all required fields (First Name, Last Name, Street Address, City, State, ZIP Code, Phone Number)
Click "Update Profile"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields and the profile is not updated.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Submission triggers validation of each entry (format and completeness)

test_cases.title: Update with invalid ZIP Code format shows inline errors
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Update Contact Info form is visible
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values except enter an invalid ZIP Code format
Click "Update Profile"
test_cases.expected_result: ZIP Code field is highlighted, an inline error banner is displayed, and the profile is not updated.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Submission triggers validation of each entry (format and completeness)

test_cases.title: Update with invalid phone number format shows inline errors
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and Update Contact Info form is visible
steps: Fill all required fields with valid values except enter an invalid phone number format
Click "Update Profile"
test_cases.expected_result: Phone field is highlighted, an inline error banner is displayed, and the profile is not updated.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Submission triggers validation of each entry (format and completeness)

test_cases.title: Request Debit card successfully
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Manage Cards page is open with an eligible account in good standing.
steps: Select Card Type as Debit
Fill all required fields (Account to Link: select an eligible account, Shipping Address: enter a complete address)
Click "Request Card"
test_cases.expected_result: A card-request ticket is opened and "Card request submitted successfully." message with a tracking ID is displayed.

test_cases.title: Freeze an active card (valid status transition)
test_cases.preconditions: An existing card is in "Active" status and selectable.
steps: Select the existing active card
Fill all required fields (Card Status set to Frozen, optionally update New Spending Limit or leave unchanged)
Click "Update Controls"
test_cases.expected_result: Displays "Card controls updated successfully." and the card status changes to Frozen on the card details.

test_cases.title: Submit valid card request using Credit card type
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Manage Cards page is open
steps: Select Card Type as Credit, select a valid Account to Link, and fill a complete Shipping Address
Click "Request Card"
test_cases.expected_result: A card-request ticket is opened and the page shows "Card request submitted successfully." with a tracking ID.

test_cases.title: Update card controls with valid limit, travel notice, and status
test_cases.preconditions: An existing card is available and selectable.
steps: Select an existing card
Fill all required fields (New Spending Limit with a valid amount within policy, Travel Notice with valid start and end dates and destinations, Card Status with an allowed value)
Click "Update Controls"
test_cases.expected_result: Displays "Card controls updated successfully." and the card's spending limit, travel notice, and status reflect the updated values.

test_cases.title: Submit when selected account is not in good standing
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Manage Cards page is open
steps: Select a valid Card Type, select an Account to Link that is not in good standing, and fill a complete Shipping Address
Click "Request Card"
test_cases.expected_result: Submission is rejected with an error indicating the selected account is not eligible for a card request.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system verifies the selected account’s standing

test_cases.title: Reject spending limit above policy
test_cases.preconditions: An existing card is available and selectable.
steps: Select an existing card
Fill all required fields (New Spending Limit set above the allowed policy limit, Card Status with an allowed value)
Click "Update Controls"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error shown for the spending limit and the form remains editable.
test_cases.spec_evidence: A limit above policy is a validation failure

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Manage Cards page is open
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Request Card"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system checks that the address is complete

test_cases.title: Submit with incomplete shipping address
test_cases.preconditions: User is logged in and Manage Cards page is open.
steps: Select a valid Card Type and an eligible Account to Link
Enter an incomplete Shipping Address (missing required address parts)
Click "Request Card"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the address is incomplete and the request is not submitted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system checks that the address is complete

test_cases.title: Reject disallowed card-status transition
test_cases.preconditions: An existing card is in a status that does not allow the attempted transition and is selectable.
steps: Select the existing card in the disallowed initial status
Fill all required fields (Card Status set to the disallowed target status, other required fields as needed)
Click "Update Controls"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error shown indicating the status transition is not allowed and the form remains editable.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates allowable card-status transitions

test_cases.title: Reject travel notice with invalid date range
test_cases.preconditions: An existing card is available and selectable.
steps: Select an existing card
Fill all required fields (Travel Notice with an end date earlier than the start date, and other required fields as needed)
Click "Update Controls"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error shown for the travel notice date range and the form remains editable.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system validates date ranges

test_cases.title: Execute a same-day buy trade with valid inputs
test_cases.preconditions: User has sufficient buying power and the selected symbol exists.
steps: Fill all required fields (Action = Buy, Fund Symbol selected via autocomplete, Quantity with a positive integer, Funding Account selected)
Click "Execute Trade"
test_cases.expected_result: Trade executed successfully message with an order ID is displayed, the trade is processed same-day and holdings are updated.

test_cases.title: Create new investment plan with Weekly frequency
test_cases.preconditions: User is authenticated and on the Create Plan page
steps: Fill all required fields (Fund Symbol, Contribution Amount, Frequency set to Weekly, Start Date in the future, Funding Account with adequate balance)
Click "Create Plan"
test_cases.expected_result: Plan created successfully and the new schedule is stored and visible.

test_cases.title: Attempt buy with insufficient buying power
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields for a Buy (select Fund Symbol, set Quantity that requires more funds than available in the selected Funding Account, select Funding Account)
Click "Execute Trade"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error indicating insufficient buying power and the trade is not executed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Customer has sufficient buying power or share balance

test_cases.title: Attempt sell with insufficient share balance
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields for a Sell (select Fund Symbol, set Quantity greater than current share balance, select Destination Account)
Click "Execute Trade"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error indicating insufficient share balance and the trade is not executed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Customer has sufficient buying power or share balance

test_cases.title: Reject plan when Contribution is below minimum
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with Contribution Amount less than the minimum
Click "Create Plan"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating the contribution does not meet the minimum and Contribution Amount field is highlighted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The contribution meets the minimum

test_cases.title: Reject plan when Start Date is not in the future
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields with Start Date set to today or a past date
Click "Create Plan"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error "Start date must be in the future" shown and Start Date field highlighted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Start date is in the future

test_cases.title: Reject plan when Funding Account has inadequate balance
test_cases.preconditions: Funding account balance is less than the contribution amount
steps: Fill all required fields selecting a Funding Account with insufficient balance
Click "Create Plan"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating insufficient funds and Funding Account field highlighted.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Funding account has adequate balance

test_cases.title: Portfolio snapshot displays read-only holdings and values
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Verify the portfolio snapshot panel is visible
Confirm the panel shows current fund holdings, market value, and unrealised gain or loss and that the fields are not editable
test_cases.expected_result: The portfolio snapshot is read-only and displays current fund holdings, market value, and unrealised gain or loss.

test_cases.title: Submit with Funding Account empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all other required fields, leave Funding Account empty
Click "Create Plan"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Funding Account is required.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Funding account has adequate balance

test_cases.title: Submit with Contribution Amount empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all other required fields, leave Contribution Amount empty
Click "Create Plan"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation error indicating Contribution Amount is required.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The contribution meets the minimum

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Execute Trade"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown inline for all required fields.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Validation failures appear inline

test_cases.title: Attempt trade with non-existent symbol
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields (select an invalid/non-existent Fund Symbol via the autocomplete, set Action and Quantity, select Funding/Destination Account)
Click "Execute Trade"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error indicating the symbol is not recognized and the trade is not executed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The system checks that the symbol exists

test_cases.title: Attempt trade with zero or negative quantity
test_cases.preconditions: None
steps: Fill all required fields (Action and Fund Symbol selected, set Quantity to zero or a negative value, select Funding/Destination Account)
Click "Execute Trade"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error indicating quantity must be greater than zero and the trade is not executed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Quantity is greater than zero

test_cases.title: Contribution equals minimum creates plan (boundary)
test_cases.preconditions: Funding account has sufficient balance and minimum contribution is defined
steps: Fill all required fields with Contribution Amount equal to the minimum and other values valid
Click "Create Plan"
test_cases.expected_result: Plan is created and confirmation message "Plan created successfully." is displayed.
test_cases.spec_evidence: The contribution meets the minimum

test_cases.title: Execute trade with minimum allowable quantity (boundary case)
test_cases.preconditions: User has at least one share or sufficient buying power as appropriate.
steps: Fill all required fields (Action, Fund Symbol via autocomplete, set Quantity to the minimum allowed value, select Funding/Destination Account)
Click "Execute Trade"
test_cases.expected_result: Trade executes successfully, confirmation with order ID is displayed, and holdings update reflects the trade.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Quantity is greater than zero

test_cases.title: Generate statement for a selected month-and-year

steps: Select a month-and-year in the Statement Period control

Click "Generate Statement"

steps: Select custom Statement Period and enter a valid start date and end date
Select an account from the Account dropdown
Click "Generate Statement"
test_cases.expected_result: Statement generated successfully and transactions for the selected date range are displayed or available for download.

steps: Check the paperless statements opt-in checkbox and fill a valid email address in the Email Address field
Click "Save Preference"
test_cases.expected_result: e-Statement preference updated and confirmation displayed; the preference is reflected in the UI (checkbox remains checked and the email is saved).

test_cases.title: Update existing e-statement email address and save preference

steps: Modify the Email Address field with a different valid email address
Click "Save Preference"
test_cases.expected_result: e-Statement preference updated to the new email and confirmation displayed.

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty

steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Generate Statement"

test_cases.title: Save Preference with invalid email format

Click "Save Preference"

test_cases.title: Save Preference with all required fields empty

steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Save Preference"

Click "Generate Statement"

test_cases.spec_evidence: Unable to generate statement — please try again later.

test_cases.title: Attempt change with incorrect current password

Click "Change Password" button

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty

steps: Leave all required fields empty
Click "Change Password"

Click "Request Callback"

steps: Fill all required fields (Subject with valid length, Category, Message Body)

test_cases.title: Submit with Message Body empty

steps: Fill all other required fields (Subject with valid length, Category), leave Message Body empty

test_cases.title: Submit with all required fields empty

steps: Clear the Phone Number field so it is empty
Leave all required fields empty
Click "Request Callback"
test_cases.expected_result: Validation errors shown for all required fields.

test_cases.title: Request callback with Preferred Date before next business day

steps: Fill all required fields with valid values, set Preferred Date to a date earlier than the next business day
Click "Request Callback"
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error indicating Preferred Date must be moved to the next business day or later.
test_cases.spec_evidence: Preferred Date must be at least the next business day
